---
name: Broker pattern update
about: A scan target's HTML patterns have changed and extraction is failing
title: '[broker] Pattern broken for ...'
labels: broker-pattern
assignees: ''
---

**Which broker**
e.g., Spokeo, WhitePages, FastPeopleSearch

**What's failing**
- [ ] Name extraction
- [ ] Address extraction
- [ ] Phone extraction
- [ ] Age/DOB extraction
- [ ] Search URL returns 403/CAPTCHA

**Current HTML structure**
Paste the relevant HTML snippet from the broker's search results page (inspect element). Remove any personal data.

```html
<!-- paste here -->
```

**Suggested fix**
If you have the new regex pattern, include it here.
